promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not treat this reduction as active runtime authority, as proof that the migrated run-root registry is a full historical ledger, or as permission to promote current-state residue, _CURRENT_RUN, throughput totals, or detached strategy residue into active A2 law from this batch alone.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the deep-archive root child is now complete and its explicit handoff target is this migrated run-root parent before any descendant run-family selection.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent already isolates the needed bounded seam: a 7801-file migrated run-root split across run history, current-state residue, and detached packet spill, with a 27-line registry as the smallest high-signal index, representative family signatures, and an explicit next-step pointer toward RUN_FOUNDATION_BATCH_0001.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The deep-root child was used to preserve the root-to-registry handoff rule, the cache-export child was used to preserve archive-lane ordering and integrity-demotion discipline, and the RUN_FOUNDATION first-pass batch was used to keep descendant selection tied to an already-bounded family packet rather than to registry summary alone.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred as the primary parent for one more step because the migrated run-root needs its own reduction before descendant campaign detail becomes the next lane.
Deferred because that parent already has a completed A2-mid child and now serves as upstream comparison support rather than the current target.
Deferred because the smaller cache-export bridge already completed its bounded A2-mid reduction and now functions as comparison support only.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent first-pass source map, distillates, tensions, and candidate summary already isolate the needed seams: registry partiality, current-state residue demotion, mixed family taxonomy, packet-grammar continuity, throughput-without-readiness contradiction, and the handoff into RUN_FOUNDATION_BATCH_0001. Exact descendant contents can stay in the next bounded batch.

candidate_items.name: MIGRATED_RUN_ROOT_IS_ARCHIVE_RUN_CORPUS_HISTORY_WITH_CURRENT_STATE_RESIDUE_DEMOTED
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent as a historical run-corpus retention surface whose run history, current-state residue, and detached packet spill must not be collapsed into active runtime authority.

candidate_items.name: RUNS_REGISTRY_IS_BEST_BOUNDED_REENTRY_INDEX_BUT_REPETITIVE_AND_PARTIAL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the registry as the cleanest compact re-entry surface while blocking overread of its repetitive and partial 27-row coverage.

candidate_items.name: RUN_TREE_TAXONOMY_PRESERVES_MULTIPLE_CAMPAIGN_ERAS_OVER_ONE_SHARED_PACKET_GRAMMAR
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the mixed RUN, TEST, V2, BOOT, GPT, PHASEA, and CODEX namespace spread together with the common ZIP-traffic skeleton visible across the larger retained campaigns.

candidate_items.name: HIGH_THROUGHPUT_AND_PACKET_DENSITY_DID_NOT_EARN_READINESS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the core contradiction that long retained campaigns can accumulate large accepted totals and dense packet traffic while still ending MAX_STEPS, NOT_READY, and blocker-heavy.

candidate_items.name: EXTERNAL_STRATEGY_DEPENDENCY_AND_DETACHED_PACKET_SPILL_REMAIN_EXPLICIT_ARCHIVE_LINEAGE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the archive-side coexistence of deterministic test lineage, A1-needs-external-strategy stop reasons, and a detached residual A1_TO_A0 strategy packet.

candidate_items.name: BEST_NEXT_DESCENT_IS_RUN_FOUNDATION_BATCH_0001_AFTER_REGISTRY_HANDOFF
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's explicit next-step rule: once the registry-and-family-signature seam has been reduced, the next bounded descendant should be RUN_FOUNDATION_BATCH_0001 rather than current-state residue or a registry-only reading.

quarantined_items.name: CURRENT_STATE_LADDERS_AND_CURRENT_RUN_POINTER_AS_ACTIVE_RUNTIME_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly preserves quasi-live state ladders and a current-run pointer as archive residue, not as active runtime truth.

quarantined_items.name: RUNS_REGISTRY_AS_NORMALIZED_FINAL_LEDGER_OR_FULL_RUN_EXPLANATION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The registry is useful as an index but too repetitive and partial to stand in for the larger run corpus.

quarantined_items.name: ACCEPTED_TOTALS_AND_PACKET_VOLUME_AS_PROOF_OF_PROMOTION_READINESS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The retained summaries explicitly preserve MAX_STEPS, NOT_READY, and large blocker counts despite high throughput.

quarantined_items.name: SHARED_PACKET_GRAMMAR_AS_ONE_HOMOGENEOUS_RUNTIME_EPOCH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Common transport grammar coexists with strong family-specific overlay drift and mixed experimentation eras.

quarantined_items.name: DETACHED_A1_STRATEGY_RESIDUE_AS_NORMALIZED_CONTROL_PLANE_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The detached strategy ZIP is preserved as residual packet spill and dependency lineage, not as cleaner current authority than the normalized run tree.

quarantined_items.name: SKIPPING_PARENT_LEVEL_REGISTRY_REDUCTION_OR_REREADING_CURRENT_STATE_BEFORE_FOUNDATION_DESCENT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: This child exists specifically to complete the migrated-run-root handoff before descendant selection, while keeping current-state residue demoted.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the least noisy reusable packets in the parent: archive run-corpus demotion, registry partiality, mixed family taxonomy over shared packet grammar, throughput without readiness, external-strategy lineage, and a clean handoff into the already-bounded RUN_FOUNDATION_BATCH_0001 descendant.
They remain archive-linked, contradiction-preserving, and explicitly below active runtime, current-pointer, and registry-as-ledger authority.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain runtime overread, registry overread, throughput-as-readiness overread, homogeneous-epoch overread, detached-packet authority inflation, or lane-order collapse rather than clean A2-2 packets.
The parent is strong enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them into active law.
